_meta.status: EMPTY — template-driven generation pending lot data import

indexable_when: Internal ID has been QA'd (not a canary)
default_noindex_categories: Lots with listing='staging' → noindex but URL accessible
Lots with status='sold' for > 90 days → noindex
Lots without official_lot_code → noindex (utility URL only)

_meta.description_template: Lô {sku} phân khu Hồng Phát, diện tích {area_label}, hướng {orientation_label}{park_suffix}{water_suffix}. Khám phá vị trí trên sa bàn tương tác Hồng Hạc City.

secondary: {kind_label} sổ hồng từng căn Bắc Ninh

_meta.jsonld_schema: RealEstateListing (when listing=public + price known) OR Product (when listing=public + price unknown) OR Place (when listing=staging — no offers data)

from_lot_page.anchor: Xem trên sa bàn tương tác

generation_pipeline: Step 2: For each lot run scripts/generate-lot-seo.mjs
Step 3: Emit per-lot MDX or DB record in pages collection
Step 5: Build-time validate uniqueness of titles + canonical URLs
